sys_ux_page_property.name: chrome_header

sys_update_version.name: sys_ux_page_property_54f6ca419a610b14328b9ea03596e7e0
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_ux_page_property"><sys_ux_page_property action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><choices/><description/><name>chrome_header</name><page display_value="">10f6ca417a610b1421cfcdec3f4884bd</page><required_translations>[{"message":"Logout","comment":""},{"message":"Configure","comment":""},{"message":"UserMenu","comment":""},{"message":"Settings","comment":""}]</required_translations><route/><suffix/><sys_class_name>sys_ux_page_property</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-16 15:10:05</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>54f6ca419a610b14328b9ea03596e7e0</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>chrome_header</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Automated Network Request Management" source="x_1877518_automa_0">0ab1faa447e50714e9a5d369316d4347</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Automated Network Request Management">0ab1faa447e50714e9a5d369316d4347</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ux_page_property_54f6ca419a610b14328b9ea03596e7e0</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-16 15:10:05</sys_updated_on><type>json</type><unique_name>x_1877518_automa_0.10f6ca417a610b1421cfcdec3f4884bd.root.chrome_header</unique_name><value>{
    "privatePage":{
      "searchEnabled": true,
       "userPrefsEnabled":true,
       "currentScreenLinkConfiguration": {
            "roles": ["admin"],
            "position": 250
        },
       "globalTools":{
          "collapsingMenuId":0,
          "primaryItems":[
             {
                "label":"UserMenu",
                "icon":"user",
                "type":"menu",
                "primaryDisplay":"icon",
                "value":{
                   "children":[
                      {
                         "label": {
                          "translatable": true,
                          "message":"Settings"
                        },
                         "position":100,
                         "type":"navigation",
                         "value":{
                            "type":"route",
                            "value":{
                               "route":"settings",
                               "fields":{
                                  
                               }
                            }
                         }
                      },
                      {                   
                        "condition": {
                          "roles": ["admin", "delegated_developer"]
                        },
                         "label":{
                            "translatable": true,
                            "message":"Configure"
                          },
                         "type":"navigation",
                         "position":200,
                         "primaryDisplay":"none",
                         "value":{
                            "type":"external",
                            "opensWindow":"true",
                            "value":{
                               "href":"/nav_to.do?uri=/sys_ux_app_config.do?sys_id=14f6ca4104610b14d77c5752ac7416bd"
                            }
                         }
                      },
                      {
                         "label": {
                            "translatable": true,
                            "message":"Logout"
                          },
                         "position":500,
                         "type":"navigation",
                                "value":{
                                  "type": "AUTH_ROUTE_BINDING",
                                        "binding": {
                                            "address": ["logout"],
                                            "params": {"reload": true},
                                            "default": "/logout.do"
                                }
                        }
                      }
                   ]
                }
             }
          ],
          "secondaryItems":[]
       }
    },
    "publicPage":{
      "menuEnabled": true,
      "logoRoute": {
        "type": "route",
        "value": {
          "route": "landing",
          "fields":{}
        }
      }
    }
 }</value></sys_ux_page_property></record_update>
